data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Implementing AI-driven threat detection to proactively identify and mitigate potential cyber threats.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes machine learning algorithms to detect anomalies.

data.title: Continuous Monitoring
data.description: 24/7 monitoring of network traffic and system performance to detect and respond to potential threats immediately.
data.technical_spec: Security Operation Centers (SOC) with real-time analytics.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption of data both at rest and in transit to protect sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data storage and TLS for data in transit.

data.title: User Access Management
data.description: Strict policies and mechanisms in place to control user access to sensitive data.
data.technical_spec: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with multi-factor authentication.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular assessments and patch management protocols to address security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Patch cycles aligned with industry standards and regular penetration testing.
